ADC #2 - Mystery Document



“Essentially, it is an insurance mechanism” - tradefinanceglobal.com



Thanks to this document, some income investors are earning up to $6,000/month off even modest retirement portfolios -- with almost no risk to their principal.



Documents like this issued by the likes of Deutsche Bank, HSBC and Barclays are used every day by major corporations to protect themselves when making large investments…



But as far as we’re aware…



This Florida based asset management firm is the first to use one to protect the principal of individual investors.

ADC #1



Maybe it’s hard to believe a fixed income investment really can pay up to 12% interest…



And yet that’s exactly what Harbor City Capital’s Secured Bonds do.



In fact, they recently reached out to us to say that while the response to the recent article we wrote about them has been incredible…



A small number of investors are forgetting to leave their contact details behind after visiting. 😕



Maybe something distracted them…



That a third party would willingly take on the downside risk of an investment…



Or that banks like Barclays, Deutsche and HSBC would issue the document Harbor City Capital uses to protect it’s clients’ principal under almost all circumstances in the first place.



These are big, game changing claims for sure. So we understand the skepticism.



But based on the research we did for the article…



And after speaking to the team at Harbor City Capital and some of their clients…



We came away convinced this may be the most exciting investment opportunity in decades.



Here’s what some of their clients had to say:



"...the money shows up like clockwork. ...this is an investment opportunity where investors get to control their destiny." -  Vincent M.



“After initiation and implementation it has become set and forget monthly income” - Greg W. Golden, CFA



“It’s the easiest money I’ve ever made” - Jim, Dentist from Ohio



““An investment earning up to 12% interest...with almost zero downside risk thanks to a cash-backed principal is unheard of in today’s market.” - FINNOVA Capital



Harbor City even offers to arrange for interested investors to speak to past clients directly.

Advertorials (FB Compliant)

Can Investors Really Double Their Money With A New Kind Of Low Risk Secure “Media” Bond?



Can Investors Really Get An All But Certain Annualized Return of 12% Year-After Year - No Matter What The Markets Are Doing?





Published 3 Days Ago



Can Investors Really Double Their Money In Just Six Years With A New Kind Of Secure “Media” Bond?



JP Maroney certainly thinks so.



Because he's all but guaranteeing his clients an up to 12% annual return on their investment - with a third party happily taking on the downside.



Now that might sound crazy...



But as we speak that’s exactly what's happening for a select group of in-the-know investors..



You see, these smart investors are using JP and Harbor City Capital’s (HCC) New Secure “Media” Bonds, a new type of bond that deposits up to 1% returns each and every month into their bank accounts.  



That means investors could invest $50,000 today, and turn it into up to $98,691 in less years than there are days in the week...with a third party taking on the downside risk. 

That’s because in what may be a world first for investment products…

After months of negotiations with top tier banks such as Barclays, HSBC and Deutsche Bank...



HCC now has in its hands a document that, if some highly unlikely event were to negatively impact HCC’s ability to fulfil its obligations…

Would allow most investors to claim their principal back under almost all circumstances.

So, what is this document? 

According to tradefinanceglobal.com:

“Essentially, it is an insurance mechanism”



To understand how HCC’s investor protection works, it is easier to look at the example of mortgage insurance.



In mortgage insurance, a borrower pays a separate monthly fee to an insurance provider (often the same bank that loaned them the money) to protect the bank in case the borrower can’t repay. 



In a similar way, HCC pays a monthly fee to a third party “insurance” provider to protect their investors if almost anything were to happen to HCC (a meteor strike destroying human society might not be covered, hence “almost”) .



In exchange for the monthly fee, this provider matches every dollar invested with HCC bill-for-bill....



And sets it aside in a secure account with the bank who issued the document.



If for almost any reason HCC is unable to return their investors’ principal at the end of the 1 year investment period...



Then the bank who issued the document deposits the same amount into HCC investors’ bank accounts. 



So in effect what that means is…



This document transfers almost all 

downside risk to the “insurance” provider.



With all the uncertainty in the markets right now, I hope investors can see why this is so incredible.  



HCC’s investors can sit back and ride out whatever hits the markets in the coming months and years.  



With their up to 1% deposits appearing in their bank accounts like clockwork every month...



Instead of lying in bed awake at night worrying about how, when, or if the economy (and their portfolios) recover...



HCC’s investors sleep easy. 



They know that whatever happens, their principal is secure. 



They know that whatever happens, their investment returns are secure. 



So with the very real chance of continued uncertainty and shutdowns to come, it’s understandable why HCC have received so many inquiries already.

But there’s a catch...

Due to the unique nature of Harbor City’s investment strategy, there’s a limit to how much capital they can accept from new investors each month...so I urge everyone, if collecting up to 12% yield with almost no risk to capital interests them at all...

Take action today and CLICK HERE to learn more
